creator: scratch65535@messagebox.email
text:
The documentation for the plugin http://docs.xfce.org/apps/screenshooter/panel-plugin says " You can configure how screenshots are taken by right clicking on the plugin and selecting Properties. A preferences dialog similar to the dialog of the main application will appear. Please have a look above for the different preferences. " 

No Preferences item or dialog appears when the plugin is right-clicked
